meanings.definition: a manual usually accompanying a technical device and explaining how to install or operate it
a message describing how something is to be done
examples: he gave directions faster than she could follow them

meanings.definition: the activities of educating or instructing; activities that impart knowledge or skill
examples: good classroom teaching is seldom rewarded
he prepared for teaching while still in college
pedagogy is recognized as an important profession

meanings.definition: (computer science) a line of code written as part of a computer program
